shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "downshift initialHighlightedIndex defaultHighlightedIndex isItemDisabled disabled highlight" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '280,350p' src/hooks/utils.js && sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js && sed -n '1,170p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js && sed -n '1,130p' src/hooks/useSelect/reducer.js"

/bin/bash -lc "tail -80 src/hooks/utils.js; sed -n '1,120p' src/hooks/__tests__/utils.test.js 2>/dev/null || true; sed -n '1,120p' src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getInputProps.test.js; sed -n '1,100p' src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/utils.test.js 2>/dev/null || true; cat package.json | sed -n '1,90p'"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"const defaultProps|defaultProps =|isItemDisabled\" src/hooks/utils.js src/hooks/useCombobox/utils.js src/hooks/useSelect/utils.ts; sed -n '250,290p' src/hooks/utils.js; sed -n '1120,1165p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/getToggleButtonProps.test.js; sed -n '1440,1485p' src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getInputProps.test.js"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,35p' src/hooks/utils.js; sed -n '235,255p' src/hooks/utils.js; sed -n '100,122p' src/hooks/useCombobox/utils.js; sed -n '1,110p' src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/testUtils.js; sed -n '1,90p' src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/testUtils.js"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"getHighlightedIndexOnOpen\\(\" src --glob '"'!**/*.test.*'"'; git status --short; git diff --check; node_modules/.bin/eslint src/hooks/utils.js src/hooks/__tests__/utils.test.js"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff --stat && git status --short && git diff -- src/hooks/utils.js src/hooks/__tests__/utils.test.js'

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "Downshift hook opening now validates initialHighlightedIndex and defaultHighlightedIndex with isItemDisabled in the shared getHighlightedIndexOnOpen path. Disabled configured or selected candidates fall through to the existing fallback chain, and directional fallback chooses the next non-disabled item." -t "Downshift disabled initial highlight fix" --unit-type decision -l downshift -s codex -i 0.85'
